old_value: {"id":"ha-bdh","title":"Tighten global whitespace and padding","description":"Reduce: VenueCard p-4→p-2.5, sidebar space-y-2→space-y-1, neighborhood px-4→px-3, header py-3→py-2. Remove 4px gap below header. Goal: reclaim ~200px vertical on mobile.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"22943313+csauer02-personal-user@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T23:13:04Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-02T23:13:04Z"}

{"id":"ha-77y","title":"Compact header with horizontal scroll day strip","description":"Reduce header from 68px to ~48px. Day filters become horizontal scrollable strip. Auth/nav into hamburger menu. {"id":"ha-df7","title":"Deal Updater compact layout","description":"Reduce capture card p-8→p-4, icon w-28→w-20, main container p-6→p-4, space-y-4→space-y-3 on result cards. {"id":"ha-a6p","title":"Touch targets and form accessibility","description":"All interactive elements minimum 44px touch target. Login/admin form inputs py-2.5→py-3, buttons py-2.5→py-3. {"id":"ha-boz","title":"Bottom sheet venue list on mobile","description":"Replace fixed 40vh sidebar with swipeable bottom sheet. Map always visible underneath. Drag handle at top.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"22943313+csauer02-personal-user@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T23:13:04Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-02T23:13:04Z"}
